Notice Of Motion For Order Granting Preference In Setting Case For Trial
Off Calendar Jun-13-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Motion for preference, CCP 36(d), granted. Trial date set for Jul-14-2003, mandatory settlement conference set for Jul-11-2003. Motions for expedited summary judgment to be heard on Jul-03-2003. Parties stipulated to having motions for summary judgment heard on shortened time according to the following briefing schedule. Moving papers to be filed and served by Jun-23-2003, opposition due by Jun-27-2003, reply due by Jul-02-2003. Motions to be heard on Jul-03-2003. All papers to be fax served.
